mapper.select:
SELECT AR_DETAIL.PK_NO, AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, GET_EMPID(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID) AS EMPID, AR_DETAIL.ITEM_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(AR_DETAIL.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME, TO_CHAR(AR_DETAIL.FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(AR_DETAIL.TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS TO_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS AR_DATE_STR, REPLACE(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 'DD/MM/YYYY'), '/', '.') AS DATE_STR, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, 'IN') AS INDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, 'OUT') AS OUTDOOR_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS SHIFT_START_YYYY, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'HH24') AS SHIFT_START_HH, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'MI') AS SHIFT_START_MI, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS SHIFT_END_YYYY, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'HH24') AS SHIFT_END_HH, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID, AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'MI') AS SHIFT_END_MI, AR_DETAIL.LOCK_YN FROM AR_DETAIL_HFSV AR_DETAIL WHERE AR_DETAIL.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AR_DETAIL.ITEM_NO IN ('141443', '141441', '141442', '14015448') AND AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR NOT IN ( SELECT AR_DATE_STR FROM ESS_CARD_APPLY_TB CARD WHERE AFFIRM_FLAG IN ('14014306', '14014307', '14014308') AND CARD.CONFIRM_FLAG <> '2' AND PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
AND AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
ORDER BY AR_DETAIL.AR_DATE_STR DESC
